items.title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
items.summary: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

items.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
items.summary: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

items.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
items.summary: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

items.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
items.summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
